name: 财务汇总报表
description: 从 Excel 数据中生成财务汇总报表，通过 SQL 计算各部门收入、支出和利润率，输出格式化的 Excel 报表。
author: ConfigForge

scene.name: 财务汇总报表
scene.description: 生成包含收入、支出和利润计算的财务汇总报表

processors.name: 计算财务汇总
processors.sql: SELECT department, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'revenue' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_revenue, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_expenses, SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'revenue' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS net_profit, ROUND(CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'revenue' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS FLOAT) / NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'revenue' THEN amount ELSE 0 END), 0) * 100, 2) AS profit_margin_pct FROM transactions GROUP BY department ORDER BY net_profit DESC
